namespace.name: demo
namespace.description: Generic demo namespace seeded from repository runbook guidance.

entities.name: Deploy Model
entities.summary: Use one repository with account-specific Wrangler configs and explicit target selection.

entities.name: Access Scope
entities.summary: Protect only versioned API paths; keep docs and OpenAPI endpoints public.

entities.name: Workers Builds Parity
entities.summary: Pin account-specific build/deploy/version commands in dashboard settings.

entities.name: Secrets Matrix
entities.summary: Use target-scoped GitHub secrets with placeholder values per account.

entities.name: Rate Limiting
entities.summary: Optional bindings should guard auth-sensitive and search-heavy paths.

entities.name: JWT and JWKS
entities.summary: JWT verification supports multiple audiences and JWKS endpoints with cache fallback.

entities.name: Audit Logging
entities.summary: Write security-significant auth events to object storage with retention policy.

entities.name: Merge Strategy
entities.summary: Use merge commits to preserve granular conventional commits for changelogs.

memories.content: Template: single-repo model uses per-account deployment configs and explicit target selection.
Template: Access scope protects /api/v1 while /api/docs and /api/openapi.json remain public.
Template: dashboard build commands should always reference the correct wrangler config.
Template: secrets use target suffixes (_A, _B) for IDs, secrets, and API base URLs.
Template: RATE_LIMIT_AUTH and RATE_LIMIT_SEARCH are optional and tuned per environment.
Template: JWKS cache uses short TTL and retries once on kid miss for key rotation.
Template: audit events include bind request/create/deny/conflict and successful token bind actions.
Template: merge commits are preferred for release-note quality with git-cliff.
